holdings.infoBox: IEFA is an equity ETF with a total of 2664 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 2.86%, HSBC Holdings at 1.25%, Roche Holding AG at 1.13%, Novartis AG at 1.09%, and AstraZeneca at 1.05%.

overview.description: The iShares Core MSCI EAFE ETF (IEFA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of developed-market stocks in Europe, Australasia and the Far East, and excludes North America IEFA was launched on Oct 18, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
